title: GEPs' refinement and next steps
author: Cicaloni, Martina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This deliverable documents the refinement process of institutional Gender Equality Plans (GEPs) conducted by NEXUS implementing partners, and identifies further inclusive and innovative actions to be implemented beyond the project’s lifetime.
steps_raw: This deliverable documents the refinement process of institutional Gender Equality Plans (GEPs) conducted by NEXUS implementing partners, and identifies further inclusive and innovative actions to be implemented beyond the project’s lifetime.
